news.paragraph: Walmart recently saw a price target increase from Bernstein to $145, supported by news of the company expanding its wellness partnerships to drive customer loyalty. However, traders should note recent discussions regarding the stock's valuation and its tendency to sink during broader market gains. No specific imminent catalysts like earnings or regulatory actions are highlighted in the current headlines.
headlines: Bernstein Adjusts Price Target on Walmart to $145 From $134, Maintains Outperform Rating
Walmart Expands Wellness Partners To Support Loyalty And Store Differentiation
